Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Luis Molina for Personal Representative.

Mr. Molina stated that at the last hearing the Court granted 90-days to close out the estate and that he believes they can file their petition by January 22, 2019. The Report on Status of Administration, etc. is continued to January 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate on calendar for January 22, 2019 is also continued to January 28, 2019.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Status on close of estate is continued to January 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that a further continuance will be disfavored.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Luis Molina for petitioner Joel Ventresca

The Court inquired regarding the status of the inventory and appraisal. Mr. Molina informed the Court that he had provided the inventory to the Probate Referee two weeks ago, and that he was advised it would take the probate referee 4-6 weeks to complete the appraisal, as the estate included properties in four different counties, one of which is quite slow in providing information needed for the appraisal. He stated that in part delay had occured because of the period of time he was waiting for the Court to enter the order appointing Probate Referee. He requested that the status hearing be continued to a date after July 4, 2017. The matter was continued to July 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Continued To Feb-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Luis Molina for and with Joel Ventresca.

Mr. Molina stated that he just substituted in last week, that he is still waiting for the rest of the file from former Counsel and that he will be asking for appointment of a Probate Referee. Mr. Molina also stated that the Beneficiaries have had discussion regarding sale of the four pieces of undeveloped land. The Court informed Counsel that a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration and a proposed order is needed. Status on close of the Estate is continued to February 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Barrientos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Vetresca, petitioner/personal representative.

The Court noted that the substitution of attorney form filed with the Court is invalid, as it expressly provides that it is not for use by fiduciaries. Mr. Vetresca stated that he has set up an appointment with prospective new counsel, and requested a continuance of 60 days. The Courtdeclined to grant the 60 day continuance, noting that the Inventory and Appraisal and the Petition for Final Distribution are long overdue, and that prompt action was needed by the personal representative to comply with his duties. The matter was continued to January 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status hearing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
